intent: 2BR / 2 baths DISTRIBUTED — SMALL with FRONT carport. Ensuite between master and standard; common T&B at rear-middle; separate L + D + K stacked. 11 × 12 lot with the carport parallel-parked across the front setback. The runner bumps the front setback to 3.0 m → envelope 7 × 7 = 49 m² (same effective floor as the 11×11 NCP brief, just with a deeper lot to accommodate the front carport's 3 m setback). No L-cut into the envelope — clean rectangular footprint.
must_haves: common bath accessible from dining (publicly) and standard (privately)
distributed baths (ensuite in private column, common at rear-middle)
